query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.49 (commit: f37fdc97).

## Issue to Resolve

False positive indent after updating from 0.47.1
## Expected Behavior

Following code should pass indent validation:
```kotlin
    private fun test(): Boolean? =
        runCatching { true }
            .getOrNull()?.let { result ->
                !result
            }
```

It's also how IDEA indents code.

## Observed Behavior

0.48.2 and current master ([44ad030](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/commit/44ad0303546f07887058ed444a73cd9c1df1e712)) return:

```
[LintError(line=4, col=1, ruleId=standard:indent, detail=Unexpected indentation (12) (should be 8), canBeAutoCorrected=true),
    LintError(line=5, col=1, ruleId=standard:indent, detail=Unexpected indentation (8) (should be 4), canBeAutoCorrected=true)]
```

This snippet was accepted by 0.47.1.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/IndentationRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 116→import java.util.Deque

 118→
 119→private val LOGGER = KotlinLogging.logger {}.initKtLintKLogger()
 120→
 121→public class IndentationRule :
 122→    StandardRule(
 123→        id = "indent",
 124→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 125→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 126→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 127→                ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 128→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 129→            ),
 130→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 131→                ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 132→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 133→            ),
 134→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 135→                ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 136→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 137→            ),
 138→        ),
 139→        usesEditorConfigProperties = setOf(
 140→            CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 141→            INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 142→            INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 143→        ),
 144→    ) {
 145→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 146→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 147→
 148→    private var line = 1
 149→
 150→    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 151→
 152→    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 153→
 154→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 155→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 156→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 157→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 158→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 159→        )
 160→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 161→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 162→        }
 163→    }
 164→
 165→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 166→        node: ASTNode,
 167→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 168→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 169→    ) {
 170→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 171→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 172→            node
 173→                .nextLeaf()
 174→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 175→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 176→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 177→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 178→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 179→                    }
 180→                }
 181→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 182→        }
 183→
 184→        when {
 185→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 186→                line++
 187→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 188→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 189→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 190→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 191→                    )
 192→                }
 193→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 194→            }
 195→
 196→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 197→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 198→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 199→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY ||
 200→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 201→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 202→                startIndentContext(
 203→                    fromAstNode = node,
 204→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 205→                )
 206→
 207→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 208→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 209→
 210→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED &&
 211→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF ->
 212→                startIndentContext(node)
 213→
 214→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 215→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 216→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 217→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ->
 218→                startIndentContext(node)
 219→
 220→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 221→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 222→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 223→                startIndentContext(
 224→                    fromAstNode = node,
 225→                    childIndent = "",
 226→                )
 227→
 228→            node.elementType == IF ->
 229→                visitIf(node)
 230→
 231→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 232→                visitLbrace(node)
 233→
 234→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 235→                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 236→                startIndentContext(
 237→                    fromAstNode = node,
 238→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 239→                )
 240→
 241→            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 242→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 243→                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 244→
 245→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 246→                visitValueParameter(node)
 247→
 248→            node.elementType == FUN ->
 249→                visitFun(node)
 250→
 251→            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 252→                visitClass(node)
 253→
 254→            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 255→                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 256→
 257→            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 258→                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 259→
 260→            node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION ||
 261→                node.elementType == SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION ||
 262→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE -> {
 263→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 264→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 265→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 266→                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 267→                ) {
 268→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 269→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 270→                    //    .bar[0] {
 271→                    //        "foobar"
 272→                    //    }
 273→                    startIndentContext(
 274→                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 275→                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 276→                    )
 277→                } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != node.elementType) {
 278→                    startIndentContext(node)
 279→                }
 280→            }
 281→
 282→            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 283→                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 284→                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 285→
 286→            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 287→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 288→                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 289→
 290→            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 291→                visitWhen(node)
 292→
 293→            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 294→                visitWhenEntry(node)
 295→
 296→            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 297→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 298→                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 299→
 300→            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 301→                visitKdoc(node)
 302→
 303→            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ||
 304→                node.elementType == TYPEALIAS ->
 305→                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 306→
 307→            node.elementType == FOR ||
 308→                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 309→                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 310→
 311→            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 312→                visitLBracket(node)
 313→
 314→            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 315→                visitNullableType(node)
 316→
 317→            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION ->
 318→                visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 319→
 320→            node.elementType == TRY ->
 321→                visitTryCatchFinally(node)
 322→
 323→            else -> {
 324→                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 325→            }
 326→        }
 327→    }
 328→
 329→    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 330→        node
 331→            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 332→            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 333→                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 334→                val nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 335→                    fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 336→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 337→
 338→                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 339→                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 340→                    startIndentContext(
 341→                        fromAstNode = node,
 342→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 343→                        childIndent = "",
 344→                    )
 345→                }
 346→            }
 347→    }
 348→
 349→    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 350→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 351→        node
 352→            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 353→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 354→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 355→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 356→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 357→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 358→            }
 359→
 360→        node
 361→            .findChildByType(THEN)
 362→            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 363→            ?.nextLeaf()
 364→            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 365→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 366→                    fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 367→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 368→                    childIndent = "",
 369→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 370→            }
 371→        node
 372→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 373→            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 374→            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 375→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 376→                    fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 377→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 378→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 379→            }
 380→        startIndentContext(
 381→            fromAstNode = node,
 382→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 383→            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 384→        )
 385→    }
 386→
 387→    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 388→        // Outer indent context
 389→        val rbrace = requireNotNull(
 390→            node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 391→        ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 392→        startIndentContext(
 393→            fromAstNode = node,
 394→            toAstNode = rbrace,
 395→            firstChildIndent = "",
 396→            lastChildIndent = "",
 397→        )
 398→
 399→        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 400→        node
 401→            .treeParent
 402→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 403→            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 404→            ?.let { arrow ->
 405→                startIndentContext(
 406→                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 407→                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 408→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 409→                )
 410→                startIndentContext(
 411→                    fromAstNode = node,
 412→                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 413→                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 414→                )
 415→            }
 416→    }
 417→
 418→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 419→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official || isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 420→            // val fieldExample =
 421→            //      LongNameClass {
 422→            //              paramA,
 423→            //              paramB,
 424→            //              paramC ->
 425→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 426→            //      }
 427→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 428→        } else {
 429→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 430→            // val fieldExample =
 431→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 432→            //                     paramB,
 433→            //                     paramC ->
 434→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 435→            //     }
 436→            parent(CALL_EXPRESSION)
 437→                ?.let { callExpression ->
 438→                    val textBeforeFirstParameter =
 439→                        callExpression.findChildByType(REFERENCE_EXPRESSION)?.text +
 440→                            " { "
 441→                    " ".repeat(textBeforeFirstParameter.length)
 442→                }
 443→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 444→        }
 445→
 446→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 447→        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 448→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 449→            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null
 450→
 451→    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 452→        startIndentContext(
 453→            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 454→            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 455→            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 456→            childIndent = "",
 457→        )
 458→    }
 459→
 460→    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 461→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 462→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 463→        node
 464→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 465→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 466→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 467→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 468→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 469→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 470→            }
 471→
 472→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 473→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 474→            //     fun process(
 475→            //         aVariableWithAVeryLongName:
 476→            //             TypeWithAVeryLongNameThatDoesNotFitOnSameLineAsTheVariableName
 477→            //     ): List<Output>
 478→            node
 479→                .findChildByType(COLON)
 480→                ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 481→                    nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 482→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 483→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 484→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 485→                }
 486→        }
 487→
 488→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 489→        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 490→        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 491→            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 492→            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 493→        ) {
 494→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 495→                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 496→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 497→            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 498→        } else {
 499→            startIndentContext(
 500→                fromAstNode = node,
 501→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 502→                childIndent = "",
 503→            )
 504→        }
 505→    }
 506→
 507→    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 508→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 509→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 510→        val eqOrBlock =
 511→            node.findChildByType(EQ)
 512→                ?: node.findChildByType(BLOCK)
 513→        eqOrBlock?.let {
 514→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 515→                fromAstNode = eqOrBlock,
 516→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 517→            ).prevCodeLeaf()
 518→        }
 519→
 520→        node
 521→            .findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE)
 522→            ?.let { typeReference ->
 523→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 524→                    fromAstNode = typeReference.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 525→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 526→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 527→            }
 528→
 529→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as function itself
 530→        startIndentContext(
 531→            fromAstNode = node,
 532→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 533→            childIndent = "",
 534→        )
 535→    }
 536→
 537→    private fun visitClass(node: ASTNode) {
 538→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 539→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 540→        node
 541→            .findChildByType(WHERE_KEYWORD)
 542→            ?.let { where ->
 543→                val typeConstraintList =
 544→                    requireNotNull(
 545→                        where.nextCodeSibling(),
 546→                    ) { "Can not find code sibling after WHERE in CLASS" }
 547→                require(
 548→                    typeConstraintList.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST,
 549→                ) { "Code sibling after WHERE in CLASS is not a TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST" }
 550→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 551→                    fromAstNode = where.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 552→                    toAstNode = typeConstraintList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 553→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 554→            }
 555→        node
 556→            .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 557→            ?.let { superTypeList ->
 558→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 559→                    fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 560→                    toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 561→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 562→            }
 563→
 564→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 565→        startIndentContext(
 566→            fromAstNode = node,
 567→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 568→            childIndent = "",
 569→        )
 570→    }
 571→
 572→    private fun visitObjectDeclaration(node: ASTNode) {
 573→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 574→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 575→        node
 576→            .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 577→            ?.let { superTypeList ->
 578→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 579→                    fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 580→                    toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 581→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 582→            }
 583→
 584→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 585→        startIndentContext(
 586→            fromAstNode = node,
 587→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 588→            childIndent = "",
 589→        )
 590→    }
 591→
 592→    private fun visitBinaryExpression(node: ASTNode) {
 593→        if (isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node)) {
 594→            // Complex binary expression are nested in such a way that the indent context of the condition
 595→            // wrapper is not the last node on the stack
 596→            val conditionIndentContext =
 597→                indentContextStack.last { it.fromASTNode.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION }
 598→            // Create new indent context for the remainder (operator and right-hand side) of the binary expression
 599→            startIndentContext(
 600→                fromAstNode = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)!!,
 601→                toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 602→                nodeIndent = conditionIndentContext.nodeIndent,
 603→                childIndent = conditionIndentContext.childIndent,
 604→            )
 605→            startIndentContext(node.firstChildNode)
 606→        } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION ||
 607→            node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)?.firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
 608→        ) {
 609→            startIndentContext(node)
 610→        }
 611→    }
 612→
 613→    private fun visitIdentifierInProperty(node: ASTNode) {
 614→        startIndentContext(
 615→            fromAstNode = node,
 616→            toAstNode = node.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 617→        )
 618→    }

 620→    private fun visitWhen(node: ASTNode) {
 621→        var nextToASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 622→        node
 623→            .findChildByType(LPAR)
 624→            ?.let { lpar ->
 625→                nextToASTNode = startIndentContext(
 626→                    fromAstNode = lpar,
 627→                    toAstNode = node.findChildByType(RPAR)!!,
 628→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 629→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 630→            }
 631→        startIndentContext(
 632→            fromAstNode = node,
 633→            toAstNode = nextToASTNode,
 634→        )
 635→    }
 636→
 637→    private fun visitWhenEntry(node: ASTNode) {
 638→        node
 639→            .findChildByType(ARROW)
 640→            ?.let { arrow ->
 641→                val outerIndent =
 642→                    if (arrow.nextLeaf()?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 643→                        ""
 644→                    } else {
 645→                        indentConfig.indent
 646→                    }
 647→                startIndentContext(
 648→                    fromAstNode = arrow.nextLeaf()!!,
 649→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 650→                    firstChildIndent = outerIndent,
 651→                    lastChildIndent = outerIndent,
 652→                )
 653→                startIndentContext(
 654→                    fromAstNode = node,
 655→                    toAstNode = arrow,
 656→                    childIndent = "",
 657→                )
 658→            }
 659→    }

 661→    private fun visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node: ASTNode) {
 662→        startIndentContext(
 663→            fromAstNode = node,
 664→            toAstNode = node.nextCodeSibling()?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()!!,
 665→            childIndent = TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT,
 666→        )
 667→    }

 669→    private fun visitKdoc(node: ASTNode) {
 670→        node
 671→            .findChildByType(KDOC_START)
 672→            ?.nextLeaf()
 673→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 674→                startIndentContext(
 675→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 676→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 677→                    childIndent = KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT,
 678→                )
 679→            }
 680→    }
 681→
 682→    private fun visitPropertyAccessor(node: ASTNode) {
 683→        var nextToASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 684→        node
 685→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 686→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 687→                nextToASTNode = startIndentContext(
 688→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 689→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 690→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 691→            }
 692→        // No indent on preceding annotations and comments
 693→        startIndentContext(
 694→            fromAstNode = node,
 695→            toAstNode = nextToASTNode,
 696→            childIndent = "",
 697→        )
 698→    }

 700→    private fun visitConditionalLoop(node: ASTNode) {
 701→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 702→        node
 703→            .findChildByType(BODY)
 704→            ?.takeIf { it.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType != LBRACE }
 705→            ?.let { rpar ->
 706→                startIndentContext(
 707→                    fromAstNode = rpar,
 708→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 709→                )
 710→            }
 711→        node
 712→            .findChildByType(CONDITION)
 713→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 714→                startIndentContext(fromAstNode)
 715→            }
 716→    }
 717→
 718→    private fun visitLBracket(node: ASTNode) {
 719→        node
 720→            .treeParent
 721→            .takeUnless {
 722→                // Should be resolved in IntelliJ IDEA default formatter:
 723→                // https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KTIJ-14859/Too-little-indentation-inside-the-brackets-in-multiple-annotations-with-the-same-target
 724→                it.elementType == ANNOTATION
 725→            }?.findChildByType(RBRACKET)
 726→            ?.let { rbracket ->
 727→                startIndentContext(
 728→                    fromAstNode = node,
 729→                    toAstNode = rbracket,
 730→                    firstChildIndent = "",
 731→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 732→                )
 733→            }
 734→    }

 736→    private fun visitNullableType(node: ASTNode) {
 737→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 738→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 739→        node
 740→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 741→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 742→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 743→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 744→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 745→                    childIndent = "",
 746→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 747→            }
 748→        startIndentContext(
 749→            fromAstNode = node,
 750→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 751→        )
 752→    }

 754→    private fun visitDestructuringDeclaration(node: ASTNode) {
 755→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 756→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 757→        node
 758→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 759→            ?.let { eq ->
 760→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 761→                    fromAstNode = eq,
 762→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 763→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 764→            }
 765→
 766→        node
 767→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 768→            ?.let {
 769→                startIndentContext(
 770→                    fromAstNode = node,
 771→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 772→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 773→                )
 774→            }
 775→    }
 776→
 777→    private fun visitTryCatchFinally(node: ASTNode) {
 778→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 779→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 780→        node
 781→            .findChildByType(FINALLY)
 782→            ?.let { finally ->
 783→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 784→                    fromAstNode = finally,
 785→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 786→                    childIndent = "",
 787→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 788→            }
 789→
 790→        node
 791→            .findChildByType(CATCH)
 792→            ?.let { catch ->
 793→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 794→                    fromAstNode = catch,
 795→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 796→                    childIndent = "",
 797→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 798→            }
 799→
 800→        startIndentContext(
 801→            fromAstNode = node,
 802→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 803→            lastChildIndent = "",
 804→        )
 805→    }
 806→
 807→    private fun ASTNode.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations(): ASTNode {
 808→        require(elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR || elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER)
 809→        return findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
 810→            ?.let { modifierList ->
 811→                modifierList
 812→                    .children()
 813→                    .firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() && it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
 814→                    ?: modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
 815→            }
 816→            ?: children().firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() }
 817→            ?: this
 818→    }
 819→
 820→    private fun ASTNode.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(): ASTNode {
 821→        var fromAstNode: ASTNode? = this
 822→        while (fromAstNode?.prevLeaf() != null &&
 823→            (fromAstNode.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpace() || fromAstNode.prevLeaf()?.isPartOfComment() == true)
 824→        ) {
 825→            fromAstNode = fromAstNode.prevLeaf()
 826→        }
 827→        return fromAstNode!!
 828→    }
 829→
 830→    private fun isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node: ASTNode) =
 831→        node
 832→            .parents()
 833→            .takeWhile { it.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION || it.elementType == CONDITION }
 834→            .lastOrNull()
 835→            ?.elementType == CONDITION
 836→
 837→    private fun currentIndent() =
 838→        indentContextStack
 839→            .peekLast()
 840→            .indent()
 841→
 842→    private fun startIndentContext(
 843→        fromAstNode: ASTNode,
 844→        toAstNode: ASTNode = fromAstNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 845→        nodeIndent: String = currentIndent(),
 846→        childIndent: String = indentConfig.indent,
 847→        firstChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 848→        lastChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 849→    ): IndentContext =
 850→        IndentContext(
 851→            fromASTNode = fromAstNode,
 852→            toASTNode = toAstNode,
 853→            nodeIndent = nodeIndent,
 854→            firstChildIndent = firstChildIndent,
 855→            childIndent = childIndent,
 856→            lastChildIndent = lastChildIndent,
 857→        ).also { newIndentContext ->
 858→            LOGGER.trace {
 859→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.nodeIndent)
 860→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.childIndent)
 861→                "Create new indent context (same as parent) with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
 862→                    "${fromAstNode.elementType}: ${newIndentContext.nodes}"
 863→            }
 864→            indentContextStack.addLast(newIndentContext)
 865→        }
 866→
 867→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
 868→        node: ASTNode,
 869→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 870→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 871→    ) {
 872→        while (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.toASTNode == node) {
 873→            LOGGER.trace {
 874→                val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 875→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
 876→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
 877→                "Remove indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for ${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: " +
 878→                    "${indentContext.nodes}"
 879→            }
 880→            indentContextStack
 881→                .removeLast()
 882→                .also {
 883→                    LOGGER.trace {
 884→                        val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 885→                        val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
 886→                        val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
 887→                        "Last indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
 888→                            "${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: ${indentContext.nodes}"
 889→                    }
 890→                }
 891→        }
 892→    }
 893→
 894→    override fun afterLastNode() {
 895→        require(indentContextStack.isEmpty()) {
 896→            indentContextStack
 897→                .joinToString(prefix = "Stack should be empty:\n\t", separator = "\n\t") { it.toString() }
 898→        }
 899→    }
 900→
 901→    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
 902→        node: ASTNode,
 903→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 904→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 905→    ) {
 906→        if (node.ignoreIndent()) {
 907→            return
 908→        }
 909→
 910→        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
 911→        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
 912→        val text = node.text
 913→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
 914→        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
 915→            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
 916→                emit(
 917→                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
 918→                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
 919→                    true,
 920→                )
 921→            } else {
 922→                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
 923→                // been emitted.
 924→            }
 925→            LOGGER.trace {
 926→                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
 927→                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
 928→            }
 929→            if (autoCorrect) {
 930→                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
 931→                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
 932→                )
 933→            }
 934→        } else {
 935→            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 936→        }
 937→    }
 938→
 939→    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
 940→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
 941→        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
 942→            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 943→            return true // raw strings (""") are allowed at column 0
 944→        }
 945→
 946→        nextLeaf
 947→            ?.parent({ it.psi is PsiComment }, strict = false)
 948→            ?.let { comment ->
 949→                if (text.endsWith("\n")) {
 950→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 951→                    return true // comments are allowed at column 0
 952→                }
 953→                if (comment.textContains('\n') && comment.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT) {
 954→                    // FIXME: while we cannot assume any kind of layout inside a block comment,
 955→                    // `/*` and `*/` can still be indented
 956→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
 957→                    return true
 958→                }
 959→            }
 960→        return false
 961→    }
 962→
 963→    private fun ASTNode?.isStartOfRawStringLiteral(): Boolean = this != null && this.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE && this.text == "\"\"\""
 964→
 965→    private fun ASTNode.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded() =
 966→        LOGGER.trace { "No indentation change required for $elementType: ${textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 967→
 968→    private fun ASTNode.expectedIndent(): String {
 969→        val lastIndexContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 970→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
 971→        val adjustedChildIndent =
 972→            when {
 973→                this == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ||
 974→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ->
 975→                    lastIndexContext.firstChildIndent
 976→
 977→                this == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ||
 978→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ->
 979→                    lastIndexContext.lastChildIndent
 980→
 981→                else -> lastIndexContext.childIndent
 982→            }
 983→        return lastIndexContext.nodeIndent + adjustedChildIndent
 984→    }
 985→
 986→    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {
 987→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
 988→        return when (indentConfig.indentStyle) {
 989→            SPACE -> {
 990→                if ('\t' in nodeIndent) {
 991→                    emit(
 992→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
 993→                        "Unexpected tab character(s)",
 994→                        true,
 995→                    )
 996→                    indentConfig.toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndent)
 997→                } else {
 998→                    nodeIndent
 999→                }
1000→            }
1001→
1002→            TAB -> {
1003→                val acceptableTrailingSpaces = acceptableTrailingSpaces()
1004→                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1005→                if (' ' in nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces) {
1006→                    emit(
1007→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1008→                        "Unexpected space character(s)",
1009→                        true,
1010→                    )
1011→                    indentConfig
1012→                        .toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces)
1013→                        .plus(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1014→                } else {
1015→                    nodeIndent
1016→                }
1017→            }
1018→        }
1019→    }
1020→
1021→    private fun visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(
1022→        node: ASTNode,
1023→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1024→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1025→    ) {
1026→        if (!this::stringTemplateIndenter.isInitialized) {
1027→            stringTemplateIndenter = StringTemplateIndenter(indentConfig)
1028→        }
1029→        stringTemplateIndenter.visitClosingQuotes(currentIndent(), node.treeParent, autoCorrect, emit)
1030→    }
1031→
1032→    private fun ASTNode.acceptableTrailingSpaces(): String {
1033→        require(elementType == WHITE_SPACE)
1034→        val acceptableTrailingSpaces = when (nextLeaf()?.elementType) {
1035→            KDOC_LEADING_ASTERISK, KDOC_END -> {
1036→                // The indentation of a KDoc comment contains a space as the last character regardless of the indentation
1037→                // style (tabs or spaces) except for the starting line of the KDoc comment
1038→                KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1039→            }
1040→
1041→            TYPE_CONSTRAINT -> {
1042→                // 6 spaces (length of "where" keyword plus a separator space) to indent type constraints as below:
1043→                //    where A1 : RecyclerView.Adapter<V1>,
1044→                //               A1 : ComposableAdapter.ViewTypeProvider,
1045→                TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1046→            }
1047→
1048→            else -> ""
1049→        }
1050→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1051→        return if (nodeIndent.endsWith(acceptableTrailingSpaces)) {
1052→            return acceptableTrailingSpaces
1053→        } else {
1054→            ""
1055→        }
1056→    }
1057→
1058→    private fun startNoIndentZone(node: ASTNode) =
1059→        IndentContext(
1060→            fromASTNode = node,
1061→            nodeIndent = "",
1062→            firstChildIndent = "",
1063→            childIndent = "",
1064→            lastChildIndent = "",
1065→            activated = true,
1066→        )
1067→
1068→    private companion object {
1069→        const val KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT = " "
1070→        const val TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT = "      " // Length of keyword "where" plus separating space
1071→    }
1072→
1073→    private data class IndentContext(
1074→        /**
1075→         * The node on which the indent context starts.
1076→         */
1077→        val fromASTNode: ASTNode,
1078→
1079→        /**
1080→         * The node at which the indent context ends. If null, then the context ends at the last child leaf of the node
1081→         * on which the indent context starts.
1082→         */
1083→        val toASTNode: ASTNode = fromASTNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
1084→
1085→        /**
1086→         * Cumulative indentation for the node. Normally this should be equal to a multiple of the
1087→         * 'indentConfig.indentStyle' to ensure a consistent indentation style.
1088→         */
1089→        val nodeIndent: String,
1090→
1091→        /**
1092→         * Additional indentation for first child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1093→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1094→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1095→         */
1096→        val firstChildIndent: String,
1097→
1098→        /**
1099→         * Additional indentation for child nodes. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to ensure
1100→         * a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it is
1101→         * still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1102→         */
1103→        val childIndent: String,
1104→
1105→        /**
1106→         * Additional indentation for last child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1107→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1108→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1109→         */
1110→        val lastChildIndent: String,
1111→
1112→        /**
1113→         * True when the indentation level of this context is activated
1114→         */
1115→        val activated: Boolean = false,
1116→    ) {
1117→        val nodes: String
1118→            get() =
1119→                fromASTNode
1120→                    .prevLeaf() // The 'fromAstNode' itself needs to be returned by '.leaves()' call as well
1121→                    ?.leaves()
1122→                    .orEmpty()
1123→                    .takeWhile {
1124→                        // The 'toAstNode' itself needs to be included as well
1125→                        it != toASTNode.nextLeaf()
1126→                    }
1127→                    .joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
1128→                    .textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1129→
1130→        fun indent() =
1131→            if (activated) {
1132→                nodeIndent + childIndent
1133→            } else {
1134→                nodeIndent
1135→            }
1136→
1137→        fun prevCodeLeaf() = fromASTNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
1138→    }
1139→}
1140→
1141→private fun ASTNode.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline() = text.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1142→
1143→private fun String.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline(): String {
1144→    val (prefix, suffix) = if (this.all { it.isWhitespace() }) {
1145→        Pair("[", "]")
1146→    } else {
1147→        Pair("", "")
1148→    }
1149→    return prefix
1150→        .plus(
1151→            this
1152→                .replace("\t", "\\t")
1153→                .replace("\n", "\\n"),
1154→        ).plus(suffix)
1155→}
1156→
1157→private class StringTemplateIndenter(private val indentConfig: IndentConfig) {
1158→    fun visitClosingQuotes(
1159→        expectedIndent: String,
1160→        node: ASTNode,
1161→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1162→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1163→    ) {
1164→        require(node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE)
1165→        node
1166→            .let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
1167→            .takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
1168→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
1169→            ?.let { _ ->
1170→                if (node.containsMixedIndentationCharacters()) {
1171→                    // It can not be determined with certainty how mixed indentation characters should be interpreted.
1172→                    // The trimIndent function handles tabs and spaces equally (one tabs equals one space) while the user
1173→                    // might expect that the tab size in the indentation is more than one space.
1174→                    emit(
1175→                        node.startOffset,
1176→                        "Indentation of multiline string should not contain both tab(s) and space(s)",
1177→                        false,
1178→                    )
1179→                    return
1180→                }
1181→
1182→                val prefixLength = node.getCommonPrefixLength()
1183→                val correctedExpectedIndent =
1184→                    if (node.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n") {
1185→                        // In case the opening quotes are placed at the start of the line, then the closing quotes
1186→                        // should have no indent as well.
1187→                        ""
1188→                    } else {
1189→                        expectedIndent
1190→                    }
1191→                node.children()
1192→                    .forEach {
1193→                        if (it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" &&
1194→                            (
1195→                                it.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() ||
1196→                                    it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() ||
1197→                                    it.isClosingQuote()
1198→                                )
1199→                        ) {
1200→                            val (actualIndent, actualContent) =
1201→                                if (it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1202→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(it.text.length)
1203→                                } else if (it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() && it.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine()) {
1204→                                    it.getFirstElementOnSameLine().text.splitIndentAt(correctedExpectedIndent.length)
1205→                                } else {
1206→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(prefixLength)
1207→                                }
1208→                            if (indentConfig.containsUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)) {
1209→                                val offsetFirstWrongIndentChar =
1210→                                    indentConfig.indexOfFirstUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)
1211→                                emit(
1212→                                    it.startOffset + offsetFirstWrongIndentChar,
1213→                                    "Unexpected '${indentConfig.unexpectedIndentCharDescription}' character(s) in margin of multiline " +
1214→                                        "string",
1215→                                    true,
1216→                                )
1217→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1218→                                    (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1219→                                        correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1220→                                    )
1221→                                }
1222→                            } else if (actualIndent != correctedExpectedIndent && it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1223→                                // It is a deliberate choice not to fix the indents inside the string literal except the line which only contains
1224→                                // the closing quotes.
1225→                                emit(
1226→                                    it.startOffset,
1227→                                    "Unexpected indent of multiline string closing quotes",
1228→                                    true,
1229→                                )
1230→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1231→                                    if (it.firstChildNode == null) {
1232→                                        (it as LeafPsiElement).rawInsertBeforeMe(
1233→                                            LeafPsiElement(REGULAR_STRING_PART, correctedExpectedIndent),
1234→                                        )
1235→                                    } else {
1236→                                        (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1237→                                            correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1238→                                        )
1239→                                    }
1240→                                }
1241→                            }
1242→                        }
1243→                    }
1244→            }
1245→    }
1246→
1247→    /**
1248→     * Get the length of the indent which is shared by all lines inside the string template except for the indent of
1249→     * the closing quotes.
1250→     */
1251→    private fun ASTNode.getCommonPrefixLength() =
1252→        children()
1253→            .filterNot { it.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE }
1254→            .filterNot { it.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE }
1255→            .filter { it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" }
1256→            .filterNot { it.text == "\n" }
1257→            .let { indents ->
1258→                val indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote = indents
1259→                    .filterNot { it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote() }
1260→                if (indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote.count() > 0) {
1261→                    indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote
1262→                } else {
1263→                    indents
1264→                }
1265→            }
1266→            .map { it.text.indentLength() }
1267→            .minOrNull()
1268→            ?: 0
1269→
1270→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimIndent() = isFollowedBy("trimIndent()")
1271→
1272→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimMargin() = isFollowedBy("trimMargin()")
1273→
1274→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedBy(callExpressionName: String) =
1275→        this.node.nextSibling { it.elementType != DOT }
1276→            .let { it?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION && it.text == callExpressionName }
1277→
1278→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
1279→        for (child in node.children()) {
1280→            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
1281→                val v = child.text
1282→                if (v == "\n") {
1283→                    return true
1284→                }
1285→            }
1286→        }
1287→        return false
1288→    }
1289→
1290→    private fun ASTNode.containsMixedIndentationCharacters(): Boolean {
1291→        assert((this.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression).isMultiLine())
1292→        val nonBlankLines = this
1293→            .text
1294→            .split("\n")
1295→            .filterNot { it.startsWith("\"\"\"") }
1296→            .filterNot { it.endsWith("\"\"\"") }
1297→            .filterNot { it.isBlank() }
1298→        val prefixLength = nonBlankLines.minOfOrNull { it.indentLength() } ?: 0
1299→        val distinctIndentCharacters = nonBlankLines
1300→            .joinToString(separator = "") {
1301→                it.splitIndentAt(prefixLength).first
1302→            }
1303→            .toCharArray()
1304→            .distinct()
1305→            .count()
1306→        return distinctIndentCharacters > 1
1307→    }
1308→
1309→    private fun ASTNode.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote() =
1310→        elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE || (text.isBlank() && nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE)
1311→
1312→    private fun ASTNode.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() = elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY && text != "\n"
1313→
1314→    private fun ASTNode.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() =
1315→        elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY || elementType == SHORT_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY
1316→
1317→    private fun ASTNode.isClosingQuote() = elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE
1318→
1319→    private fun String.indentLength() = indexOfFirst { !it.isWhitespace() }.let { if (it == -1) length else it }
1320→
1321→    /**
1322→     * Splits the string at the given index or at the first non-white space character before that index. The returned pair
1323→     * consists of the indentation and the second part contains the remainder. Note that the second part still can start
1324→     * with whitespace characters in case the original strings starts with more white space characters than the requested
1325→     * split index.
1326→     */
1327→    private fun String.splitIndentAt(index: Int): Pair<String, String> {
1328→        assert(index >= 0)
1329→        val firstNonWhitespaceIndex = indexOfFirst { !it.isWhitespace() }.let {
1330→            if (it == -1) {
1331→                this.length
1332→            } else {
1333→                it
1334→            }
1335→        }
1336→        val safeIndex = kotlin.math.min(firstNonWhitespaceIndex, index)
1337→        return Pair(
1338→            first = this.take(safeIndex),
1339→            second = this.substring(safeIndex),
1340→        )
1341→    }
1342→
1343→    private fun ASTNode.getFirstElementOnSameLine(): ASTNode {
1344→        val firstLeafOnLine = prevLeaf { it.text == "\n" }
1345→        return if (firstLeafOnLine == null) {
1346→            this
1347→        } else {
1348→            firstLeafOnLine.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true) ?: this
1349→        }
1350→    }
1351→
1352→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine(): Boolean {
1353→        var node: ASTNode? = getFirstElementOnSameLine()
1354→        while (node != null && node != this && node.text.isWhitespace()) {
1355→            node = node.nextLeaf()
1356→        }
1357→        return node != this
1358→    }
1359→
1360→    private fun String.isWhitespace() = none { !it.isWhitespace() }
1361→}
1362→
1363→public val INDENTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = IndentationRule().ruleId
1364→

conversation_history.content:
1→First off, thanks for taking the time to contribute! This guide will answer some common questions about how this project works.
 2→
 3→While this is a Pinterest open source project, we welcome contributions from everyone. Regular outside contributors can become project maintainers.
 4→
 5→## Help
 6→
 7→If you're having trouble using this project, please start by reading all documentation and searching for solutions in the existing open and closed issues.
 8→
 9→## Security
10→
11→If you've found a security issue in one of our open source projects, please report it at [Bugcrowd](https://bugcrowd.com/pinterest); you may even make some money!
12→
13→## Code of Conduct
14→
15→Please be sure to read and understand our [code of conduct](../code-of-conduct/). We work hard to ensure that our projects are welcoming and inclusive to as many people as possible.
16→
17→## Reporting Issues
18→
19→If you have a bug report, please provide as much information as possible so that we can help you out:
20→
21→- Version of the project you're using.
22→- Code (or even better a sample project) which reproduce the issue.
23→- Steps which reproduce the issue.
24→- Stack traces for crashes.
25→- Any logs produced.
26→
27→## Making Changes
28→
29→!!! tip
30→    `ktlint` only provides rules that enforce the [Kotlin coding conventions](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html) or [Android Kotlin style guide](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/style-guide). If your change is more opinionated than please [file an issue](https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/new) first so that it can be discussed amongst the community. Rules which are too opinionated might be better published as a custom rule set. 
31→
32→1. Fork this repository to your own account
33→2. Make your changes and verify that tests pass
34→3. Commit your work and push to a new branch on your fork
35→4. Submit a pull request
36→5. Participate in the code review process by responding to feedback
37→
38→Once there is agreement that the code is in good shape, one of the project's maintainers will merge your contribution.
39→
40→To increase the chances that your pull request will be accepted:
41→
42→- Follow the coding style
43→- Write tests for your changes
44→- Write a good commit message
45→- Provide context in the pull request description.
46→
47→New rules have to implement the `Rule.Experimental` interface so that the rule will only be run for user who have opted in to use experimental rules. Once the rule is stable, the marker interface `Rule.Experimental` can be removed.
48→
49→## Updating dependencies
50→
51→This project has enabled [Gradle dependencies verification](https://docs.gradle.org/6.2/userguide/dependency_verification.html). On adding/updating any dependency, ensure that you've added dependency provided checksum/signature to `gradle/verification-metadata.xml` file.
52→
53→## Using kotlin development versions
54→
55→Add following flag - `-PkotlinDev` to enable kotlin development version.
56→
57→## License
58→
59→By contributing to this project, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under its [license](/#legal).
60→

 121→public class IndentationRule :
 122→    StandardRule(
 123→        id = "indent",
 124→        visitorModifiers = setOf(
 125→            VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 126→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 127→                ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 128→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 129→            ),
 130→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 131→                ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 132→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 133→            ),
 134→            VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 135→                ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 136→                mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 137→            ),
 138→        ),
 139→        usesEditorConfigProperties = setOf(
 140→            CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 141→            INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 142→            INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 143→        ),
 144→    ) {
 145→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 146→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 147→
 148→    private var line = 1
 149→
 150→    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 151→
 152→    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 153→
 154→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 155→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 156→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 157→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 158→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 159→        )
 160→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 161→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 162→        }
 163→    }
 164→
 165→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 166→        node: ASTNode,
 167→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 168→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 169→    ) {
 170→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 171→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 172→            node
 173→                .nextLeaf()
 174→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 175→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 176→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 177→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 178→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 179→                    }
 180→                }
 181→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 182→        }
 183→
 184→        when {
 185→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 186→                line++
 187→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 188→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 189→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 190→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 191→                    )
 192→                }
 193→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 194→            }
 195→
 196→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 197→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 198→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 199→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY ||
 200→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 201→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 202→                startIndentContext(
 203→                    fromAstNode = node,
 204→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 205→                )
 206→
 207→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 208→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 209→
 210→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED &&
 211→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF ->
 212→                startIndentContext(node)
 213→
 214→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 215→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 216→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 217→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ->
 218→                startIndentContext(node)
 219→
 220→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 221→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 222→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 223→                startIndentContext(
 224→                    fromAstNode = node,
 225→                    childIndent = "",
 226→                )
 227→
 228→            node.elementType == IF ->
 229→                visitIf(node)
 230→
 231→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 232→                visitLbrace(node)
 233→
 234→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 235→                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 236→                startIndentContext(
 237→                    fromAstNode = node,
 238→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 239→                )
 240→
 241→            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 242→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 243→                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 244→
 245→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 246→                visitValueParameter(node)
 247→
 248→            node.elementType == FUN ->
 249→                visitFun(node)
 250→
 251→            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 252→                visitClass(node)
 253→
 254→            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 255→                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 256→
 257→            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 258→                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 259→
 260→            node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION ||
 261→                node.elementType == SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION ||
 262→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE -> {
 263→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 264→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 265→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 266→                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 267→                ) {
 268→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 269→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 270→                    //    .bar[0] {
 271→                    //        "foobar"
 272→                    //    }
 273→                    startIndentContext(
 274→                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 275→                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 276→                    )
 277→                } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != node.elementType) {
 278→                    startIndentContext(node)
 279→                }
 280→            }
 281→
 282→            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 283→                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 284→                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 285→
 286→            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 287→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 288→                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 289→
 290→            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 291→                visitWhen(node)
 292→
 293→            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 294→                visitWhenEntry(node)
 295→
 296→            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 297→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 298→                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 299→
 300→            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 301→                visitKdoc(node)
 302→
 303→            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ||
 304→                node.elementType == TYPEALIAS ->
 305→                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 306→
 307→            node.elementType == FOR ||
 308→                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 309→                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 310→
 311→            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 312→                visitLBracket(node)
 313→
 314→            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 315→                visitNullableType(node)
 316→
 317→            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION ->
 318→                visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 319→
 320→            node.elementType == TRY ->
 321→                visitTryCatchFinally(node)
 322→
 323→            else -> {
 324→                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 325→            }
 326→        }
 327→    }

 329→    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 330→        node
 331→            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 332→            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 333→                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 334→                val nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 335→                    fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 336→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 337→
 338→                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 339→                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 340→                    startIndentContext(
 341→                        fromAstNode = node,
 342→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 343→                        childIndent = "",
 344→                    )
 345→                }
 346→            }
 347→    }

 349→    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 350→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 351→        node
 352→            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 353→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 354→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 355→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 356→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 357→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 358→            }
 359→
 360→        node
 361→            .findChildByType(THEN)
 362→            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 363→            ?.nextLeaf()
 364→            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 365→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 366→                    fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 367→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 368→                    childIndent = "",
 369→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 370→            }
 371→        node
 372→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 373→            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 374→            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 375→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 376→                    fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 377→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 378→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 379→            }
 380→        startIndentContext(
 381→            fromAstNode = node,
 382→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 383→            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 384→        )
 385→    }

 387→    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 388→        // Outer indent context
 389→        val rbrace = requireNotNull(
 390→            node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 391→        ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 392→        startIndentContext(
 393→            fromAstNode = node,
 394→            toAstNode = rbrace,
 395→            firstChildIndent = "",
 396→            lastChildIndent = "",
 397→        )
 398→
 399→        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 400→        node
 401→            .treeParent
 402→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 403→            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 404→            ?.let { arrow ->
 405→                startIndentContext(
 406→                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 407→                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 408→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 409→                )
 410→                startIndentContext(
 411→                    fromAstNode = node,
 412→                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 413→                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 414→                )
 415→            }
 416→    }
 417→
 418→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 419→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official || isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 420→            // val fieldExample =
 421→            //      LongNameClass {
 422→            //              paramA,
 423→            //              paramB,
 424→            //              paramC ->
 425→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 426→            //      }
 427→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 428→        } else {
 429→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 430→            // val fieldExample =
 431→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 432→            //                     paramB,
 433→            //                     paramC ->
 434→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 435→            //     }
 436→            parent(CALL_EXPRESSION)
 437→                ?.let { callExpression ->
 438→                    val textBeforeFirstParameter =
 439→                        callExpression.findChildByType(REFERENCE_EXPRESSION)?.text +
 440→                            " { "
 441→                    " ".repeat(textBeforeFirstParameter.length)
 442→                }
 443→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 444→        }
 445→
 446→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 447→        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 448→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 449→            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null
 450→
 451→    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 452→        startIndentContext(
 453→            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 454→            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 455→            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 456→            childIndent = "",
 457→        )
 458→    }
 459→
 460→    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 461→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 462→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 463→        node
 464→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 465→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 466→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 467→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 468→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 469→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 470→            }
 471→
 472→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 473→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 474→            //     fun process(
 475→            //         aVariableWithAVeryLongName:
 476→            //             TypeWithAVeryLongNameThatDoesNotFitOnSameLineAsTheVariableName
 477→            //     ): List<Output>
 478→            node
 479→                .findChildByType(COLON)
 480→                ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 481→                    nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 482→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 483→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 484→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 485→                }
 486→        }
 487→
 488→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 489→        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 490→        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 491→            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 492→            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 493→        ) {
 494→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 495→                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 496→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 497→            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 498→        } else {
 499→            startIndentContext(
 500→                fromAstNode = node,
 501→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 502→                childIndent = "",
 503→            )
 504→        }
 505→    }

 507→    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 508→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 509→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 510→        val eqOrBlock =
 511→            node.findChildByType(EQ)
 512→                ?: node.findChildByType(BLOCK)
 513→        eqOrBlock?.let {
 514→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 515→                fromAstNode = eqOrBlock,
 516→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 517→            ).prevCodeLeaf()
 518→        }
 519→
 520→        node
 521→            .findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE)
 522→            ?.let { typeReference ->
 523→                nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 524→                    fromAstNode = typeReference.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 525→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 526→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 527→            }
 528→
 529→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as function itself
 530→        startIndentContext(
 531→            fromAstNode = node,
 532→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 533→            childIndent = "",
 534→        )
 535→    }
